title: Implement an identity management solution using Microsoft Entra ID
summary: Implement an identity management solution using Microsoft Entra ID

sections.title: Implement an identity management solution using Microsoft Entra ID
sections.summary: Implement an identity management solution using Microsoft Entra ID

lessons.title: Implement initial configuration of Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
Learn to create an initial Azure Active Directory configuration to ensure all the identity solutions available in Azure are ready to use. This module explores how to build and configure an Azure AD system.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-initial-configuration-of-azure-active-directory/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement initial configuration of Microsoft Entra ID

lessons.title: Create, configure, and manage identities
lessons.content_md:
Access to cloud-based workloads needs to be controlled centrally by providing a definitive identity for each user and resource. You can ensure employees and vendors have just enough access to do their job.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-configure-manage-identities/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement and manage external identities
lessons.content_md:
Inviting external users to use company Azure resources is a great benefit, but you want to do it in a secure way. Explore how to enable secure external collaboration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-manage-external-identities/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement and manage hybrid identity
lessons.content_md:
Creating a hybrid-identity solution to use your on-premises active directory can be challenging. Explore how to implement a secure hybrid-identity solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-manage-hybrid-identity/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement an identity management solution using Microsoft Entra ID
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement an identity management solution using Microsoft Entra ID**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
